query: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.emoji, t.color, t.classId, COUNT(m.id) as membros FROM teams t LEFT JOIN members m ON m.teamId = t.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3C9YCXxCojabUDk.eefe8f8e8b67 --database FUZ2ecmXaKXVi9q85vHrsr --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, t.emoji, t.color, t.classId, COUNT(m.id) as membros FROM teams t LEFT JOIN members m ON m.teamId = t.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.id;
